THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.title: Shameful Gift
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.descript:
Start each combat [gold]Weak[/gold].
Select the first card of your initial hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.selectio: Select a card to add to your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.flavor: The cost of knowing exactly what you need.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_GROWTH.title: Hard Earned Feat
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_GROWTH.descriptio:
Start each combat with 2 [gold]Unweak[/gold].
Select the first 2 cards of your initial hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_GROWTH.selectionP: Select 2 cards to add to your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CONSTANT_GROWTH.flavor: What once weighed you down now lifts you up.
